channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: The El Niño weather pattern could limit how many Atlantic st…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The El Niño weather pattern could limit how many Atlantic storms form this year. But unusually warm waters temperatures mean the risk of destructive storms is still high. n.pr/3TeS0Q7
item.content:encoded: The El Niño weather pattern could limit how many Atlantic storms form this year. But unusually warm waters temperatures mean the risk of destructive storms is still high. n.pr/3TeS0Q7

item.title: The Neil Young tribute-album series 'Heart Of Gold' announce…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The Neil Young tribute-album series 'Heart Of Gold' announced two more installments, featuring MJ Lenderman, Kurt Vile, Ben Gibbard, and more. Hear two new advance tracks…
item.content:encoded: The Neil Young tribute-album series 'Heart Of Gold' announced two more installments, featuring MJ Lenderman, Kurt Vile, Ben Gibbard, and more. Hear two new advance tracks…

item.title: The scythe-winged birds have nested in the cracks of the Wes…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The scythe-winged birds have nested in the cracks of the Western Wall and other holy sites in Jerusalem for thousands of years. n.pr/4wO8w8a
item.content:encoded: The scythe-winged birds have nested in the cracks of the Western Wall and other holy sites in Jerusalem for thousands of years. n.pr/4wO8w8a

item.title: Rolling Stone Reports, only on Apple News: A Hawaii Politici…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Rolling Stone Reports, only on Apple News: A Hawaii Politician Breaks Bad

Arthur Brun was a local Little League umpire, a council member — and running the island’s largest meth ring.

Read: apple.news/AjHvw00vMRu-...
item.content:encoded:
Rolling Stone Reports, only on Apple News: A Hawaii Politician Breaks Bad

Arthur Brun was a local Little League umpire, a council member — and running the island’s largest meth ring.

Read: apple.news/AjHvw00vMRu-...

item.title: Storm damage is expected to be limited because the El Niño w…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Storm damage is expected to be limited because the El Niño weather pattern will counter its worst effects. But unusually warm waters in the Atlantic means the risk of destructive storms is still high. n.pr/3TilVXy
item.content:encoded: Storm damage is expected to be limited because the El Niño weather pattern will counter its worst effects. But unusually warm waters in the Atlantic means the risk of destructive storms is still high. n.pr/3TilVXy

item.title: Trump will attend the dignified transfer of U.S. service mem…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Trump will attend the dignified transfer of U.S. service members killed in the Middle East. And, Pete Hegseth is requesting billions from Congress to help with the rising cost of the war in Iran. n.pr/4pDfkDk
item.content:encoded: Trump will attend the dignified transfer of U.S. service members killed in the Middle East. And, Pete Hegseth is requesting billions from Congress to help with the rising cost of the war in Iran. n.pr/4pDfkDk

item.title: 【特集】 …そして、消え逝くキミ達と。 インタビュー 一度壊れたからこそ強くなれる 挫折を経験した7人がステ…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
【特集】
…そして、消え逝くキミ達と。
インタビュー

一度壊れたからこそ強くなれる
挫折を経験した7人がステージに立つ理由
https://natalie.mu/music/pp/kiekimi

#キエキミ
item.content:encoded:
【特集】
…そして、消え逝くキミ達と。
インタビュー

一度壊れたからこそ強くなれる
挫折を経験した7人がステージに立つ理由

#キエキミ

item.title: Ruben Ray Martinez, 23, was fatally shot by an ICE agent two…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Ruben Ray Martinez, 23, was fatally shot by an ICE agent two months into President Trump's second term. His mother says her family has yet to receive justice. n.pr/4ffCfAV
item.content:encoded: Ruben Ray Martinez, 23, was fatally shot by an ICE agent two months into President Trump's second term. His mother says her family has yet to receive justice. n.pr/4ffCfAV

item.title: 愛知から上京した18歳ラッパーYog* 5曲入りEP「Boat」配信 恋愛や仲間との日常、 将来への期待と不安…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
愛知から上京した18歳ラッパーYog*

item.title: The attacks overshadowed diplomatic efforts in Pakistan, one…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The attacks overshadowed diplomatic efforts in Pakistan, one of the conflict's mediators, where a senior Iranian official held talks potentially aimed at reviving a collapsed ceasefire between the United States and Iran. n.pr/4ffTIJC
item.content:encoded: The attacks overshadowed diplomatic efforts in Pakistan, one of the conflict's mediators, where a senior Iranian official held talks potentially aimed at reviving a collapsed ceasefire between the United States and Iran. n.pr/4ffTIJC

item.title: A panel of advisers to the Food and Drug Administration will…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A panel of advisers to the Food and Drug Administration will meet this week to make recommendations on whether specialized pharmacies should be allowed to make some popular wellness peptides. n.pr/3RqRais
item.content:encoded: A panel of advisers to the Food and Drug Administration will meet this week to make recommendations on whether specialized pharmacies should be allowed to make some popular wellness peptides. n.pr/3RqRais
